KEY: C major | METER: 4/4 | TEMPO: 120 | GRID: 16th (adaptive) | BARS: 26
VOICES: A.PIANO 1[prog=0], A.PIANO 1#2[prog=0], TUBA[prog=58], TRUMPET[prog=56], ACOU BASS[prog=32], CLARINET[prog=71], TENOR SAX[prog=66], FLUTE[prog=73], DRUMS[drums]
@1 [-]
@2 [F] (grid:24t)
  TRUMPET    : G4@22>1^104 F4@23>1^104

  DRUMS      : C2+F#3@1>1^104 E2+F#3@3>1^104 C2+F#3@5>1^104 E2+F#3@7>1^104 C2+F#3@9>1^104 E2+F#3@11>2^104 C2+F#3@13>1^104 E2+F#3@15>2^104
@25 [G7]
